seoTitle: Bilbul vs Bilgola Plateau — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Bilbul vs Bilgola Plateau: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bilbul and Bilgola Plateau.
heading: Bilbul vs Bilgola Plateau — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bilbul, New South Wales and Bilgola Plateau, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bilbul has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to Bilgola Plateau (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bilbul or Bilgola Plateau safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bilbul has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Bilgola Plateau scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bilbul scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Bilgola Plateau scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bilbul or Bilgola Plateau?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bilbul has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
